3147970.name: SILKEN SHAFT
3147970.description:
"Silken Shaft" is a 2D Rogue-like climbing action game. Freely run across walls and unleash offensive/defensive attack "Boost Kick" and ascend the orbital elevator—swiftly and in style!

Make sure to cooperate with your companions to overcome this harsh journey! It’s more important than complex play skills! Acquire "W.I.S.P" , an autonomous attack unit, and make sure to upgrade "MOD" to enhance various actions along the way! Build your one and only growth strategy! No worries even if you fail! Just enhance your stats with the equipment you got and try again!

A future not so far away. Cutting-edge corporations have expanded into space, exploiting and polluting the Earth below, bridging the ever-dividing heavens and Earth stands the orbital elevator, “Silken Shaft”. It was the last remaining path to the stars for Evelyn, a cyborg whose body was stolen by these corporations. Ruthless machines—and even former friends—stand in her way. Evelyn steps onto a brutal and unforgiving path.
3147970.supported_languages: 日语, 英语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
